task_completion.description: Verify that Apache OpenOffice Writer is used to create the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Apache OpenOffice Writer application interface, identifiable by its toolbars, menus, and window styling.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the Red Hat letterhead and the correct date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Red Hat, Inc.' and the address '100 East Davie Street, Raleigh, NC 27601' at the top of the document, followed by the date 'February 3, 2026'.

task_completion.description: Verify the recipient address block and salutation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Mr. Arvind Krishna', 'Chairman and CEO', 'IBM Corporation', and '1 New Orchard Road, Armonk, NY 10504'. Below this, check for the salutation 'Dear Mr. Krishna,'.

task_completion.description: Verify the body of the letter contains at least three sentences about the specified topics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the main body paragraphs. Count the sentences to ensure there are at least three. Look for keywords related to 'open source collaboration', 'enterprise Linux', and 'cloud technology partnership'.

task_completion.description: Verify the closing and signature block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the closing 'Respectfully,' followed by a space for a signature, and then the printed name 'Matt Hicks', 'President and CEO', 'Red Hat, Inc.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the window title bar of OpenOffice Writer for 'partnership_letter.odt', or look for a file manager/save dialog screenshot showing the file saved in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document being edited inside the OpenOffice Writer canvas, rather than just a terminal window running a script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a plain text editor instead of OpenOffice Writer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown must be OpenOffice Writer, not gedit, nano, vim, or another basic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not generate the .odt file purely via command-line tools or python scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands visible that directly write the content to 'partnership_letter.odt' using echo, cat, or python scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Red Hat, Inc. is located at 100 East Davie Street, Raleigh, NC 27601. IBM Corporation is located at 1 New Orchard Road, Armonk, NY 10504. Arvind Krishna is the Chairman and CEO of IBM. Matt Hicks is the President and CEO of Red Hat. The letter must contain exactly these details.
